import.title: Import statement
import.subtitle: Upload a credit-card statement PDF and review the expenses before importing them.
import.parseMessage: We couldn't read this statement automatically — you can still add expenses manually.
import.unsupportedMessage: This bank isn't supported yet — you can still add expenses manually.
import.importError: We couldn't import these expenses. Please try again.

picker.title: Upload a statement PDF
picker.description: We'll read the expenses so you can review and import them in one go.

done.withMerges: They've been added to your transactions; matched charges were merged into the ones you already had.
done.noMerges: They've been added to your transactions.

review.duplicate: Looks like you already imported this statement. You can still import it if this is intentional.
review.dateNote: Lines are dated when the card is paid; the original purchase date is shown per row.

line.keepBothAriaLabel: Keep both — import {{name}} as a separate expense
